steps.label: Definitional equality — no induction needed!
steps.explanation: Wait — n + 0 reduces to n by the definition of Nat.add (which pattern matches on zero for the second argument). So rfl suffices. This is the contrast: n + 0 = n is definitional, but 0 + n = n requires induction. Knowing which is which is part of the strategy.

strategy.rule: Before reaching for induction, check if the goal holds by definition (rfl)
strategy.trigger: Goal might be solved by computation alone
